package.name: big_bertha_policy_controller
package.description: C++ ONNX Runtime gait controller for Big Bertha. Subscribes to /odom, /imu, /joint_states and /cmd_vel, assembles the 48-d observation, runs the exported PPO policy, and streams 12 position targets on /position_controller/commands. Publishes PolicyStatus and offers SetPolicyEnabled + LoadPolicy services.
